blended.narrative: Mount Washington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 6" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
